title: POHOVE Stainless Steel Salad Bowls,20CM Gold Bowl Mixing Bowl, ﻿Cereal Bowl, Sturdy Reusable for Kitchen Mixing Cooking Baking Prepping
features: 1. Durable and Reusable Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, ensuring long-lasting durability and reusability for all your kitchen needs. Perfect for mixing, cooking, baking, and prepping.
2. Generous Size Large capacity bowl provides enough space for mixing large batches of ingredients, ideal for both everyday meals and bulk cooking.
3. Sturdy Construction Built to withstand heavy use without bending or denting, providing reliable performance in any kitchen environment.
4. Versatile Use Suitable for a wide range of kitchen tasks including mixing cereals, preparing dough, whisking batter, and more. Also great for serving salads and side dishes.
5. Easy to Clean and Maintain Dishwasher safe and resistan-t to stains and odors, making it simple to clean and maintain hygiene. The smooth surface prevents food residu-e buildup.
